localizations.title: The night of the Boogeymen
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Did you notice the strange shape of the blind's switch in William's bedroom?
localizations.hiddenObject_2: There is something under the wing of the airplane-shaped lamp.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Did you take a close look at the window ledge?
localizations.hiddenObject_4: Your eyes are drawn to the corner of the hero box.
localizations.code_3128: The lock of the hero box unlocks.
localizations.code_3127: The lock of the hero box unlocks.
localizations.code_3100: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_3101: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_3107: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_3108: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_3110: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_3111: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_3117: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_3118: Make sure to correctly count the number of cars.
localizations.code_2577: You enter William’s dream. Take cards 17 and 49, discard the child’s drawing and cards 0, 5, 45, and 76. Then, press the “Go” button.
localizations.code_7752: You enter William’s dream. Take cards 17 and 49, discard the child’s drawing and cards 0, 5, 45, and 76. Then, press the “Go” button.
localizations.code_84711: These boogeymen are nothing but a distant nightmare for William. You helped him overcome his fears. Congratulations!
localizations.code_1609: The wardrobe opens with a squeaking sound.
localizations.code_5125: William falls back asleep. You can continue your adventure.
localizations.code_5225: William falls back asleep. You can continue your adventure.
localizations.code_7311: You destroy all the hideouts… and the boogeyman while you're at it!
localizations.code_3120: You have correctly counted the number of balls and cars but the suns are on another card.
localizations.code_3121: You have correctly counted the number of balls and cars but the suns are on another card.
localizations.code_1137: Have you correctly read the Monster Guide?
localizations.hint_2: The three cardboard boxes could easily be destroyed by this shredder.
localizations.hint_3: This cardboard box is a perfect hideout for the boogeyman. Find a way to destroy it!
localizations.hint_4: What can you observe with this telescope?
localizations.hint_5: You catch a glimpse of a beautiful starry sky. If only you could take a closer look!
localizations.hint_7: This small cardboard box is a perfect hideout for the boogeyman. Find a way to destroy it!
localizations.hint_10: This teddy bear is one of the only things that will comfort William in his dream.
localizations.hint_11: This large cardboard box is a perfect hideout for the boogeyman. Find a way to destroy it!
localizations.hint_12: Put the 5 chapters of the Monster Guide in order and read the roman numeral.
localizations.hint_17: There is only one object that could comfort William.
localizations.hint_23: Find a receptacle for this light bulb.
localizations.hint_27: It is impossible to overcome the monster without the appropriate outfit.
localizations.hint_29: This sock is invested with a powerful magic. What can you pair it with?
localizations.hint_34: Find a receptacle for this light bulb.
localizations.hint_36: It's William's size but can't wear them without socks!
localizations.hint_42: This monster uses the boxes to hide.  Organize the boxes from the smallest to the biggest to destroy it.
localizations.hint_46: You must find the right bulb for this lamp.
localizations.hint_49: To get rid of this boogeyman, find the 3 moments when to press the middle button.
localizations.hint_54: Hurry! The boogeyman is DEVOURING this card. A strong punch cost it a tooth. Its position is one of the keys for defeating the creature.
localizations.hint_55_first: Study carefully the 3 symbols on this lunchbox. You will find these scattered objects in the bedroom.
localizations.hint_55: Count the balls and the cars on the play mat, then the suns on William's bed.
localizations.hint_60: 4 hidden numbers in the child's drawing will give you the code.
localizations.hint_62: Hurry! The boogeyman is DEVOURING this card. A strong kick cost it a tooth. Its position is one of the keys for defeating the creature.
localizations.hint_65: With these shoes, William could fight anything.
localizations.hint_67: William should have tidied up his room. Some objects will be useful to you. But which ones?
localizations.hint_68: Hurry! The boogeyman is DEVOURING this card. A strong punch cost it a tooth. Its position is one of the keys for defeating the creature.
localizations.hint_72: Some of these stars do not match reality.
localizations.hint_77: Turn a soft light on to chase away this mean monster.
localizations.hint_80: "Brush his teeth for 5 minutes, turn on 1 small night-light, and count sheep up to 25."
localizations.hint_83: A notebook in William’s hidden drawer will help you find the code.
localizations.hint_84: There must be a switch to open this blind.
localizations.hint_91: "Brush his teeth for 5 minutes, turn on 1 small night-light, and count sheep up to 25."
localizations.hint_98_first: What is this monster hanging on to? Only specific threads will make it fall.
localizations.hint_98: Place the card with the window above this card to find out which threads to cut.
localizations.hint_99: Will you open or close the blind?
localizations.machine_72: You find a false bottom in this drawer. The panel opens onto a mysterious box.
localizations.machine_98: The boogeyman rolls itself up as a ball of wool and crashes onto the floor, thus freeing odd objects.
localizations.event_2: You enter into William's dream. Take cards 17 and 49, discard the child's drawing and cards 0, 5, 45, and 76. Then, press the "Go" button.
localizations.croquemitaine_hint1: What do these colors remind you of? Have the boogeyman bite the cards and look closely.
localizations.croquemitaine_hint2: Press red, then blue, then yellow.
